original_image_tags: A dark background technical illustration, possibly a photograph of a blackboard or a negative print, showing five numbered diagrams of propeller or rotor blade designs. The main title is at the top center.

elements.description: A diagram on a dark background with a white border. It features a central diagram labeled 'Figura N°1' depicting a four-bladed propeller or fan structure with horizontal slats, surrounded by radial lines and degree measurements (e.g., '345°', '360°', '15°', '315°', '300°'). At the top center, the title 'ASPAS y Helices' is visible. Surrounding the central figure are four additional diagrams: 'Figura N°2' (top left) showing a four-bladed fan with solid blades; 'Figura N°3' (top right) showing a three-bladed fan with solid blades; 'Figura N°4' (bottom left) showing a two-bladed fan with solid blades; and 'Figura N°5' (bottom right) showing a curved, S-shaped blade. Faint degree markings are visible around the outer diagrams.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: a dark background with a central diagram labeled 'Figura N°1' (four-bladed propeller/fan), surrounded by four additional diagrams (N°2-N°5) showing various blade configurations, with the title 'ASPAS y Helices' at the top.
